mode_simple_desc: static fixed prompt based off a template
mode_interactive_desc: rich CLI text editor with autocomplete
observer_fallback: standard observer failed, falling back to 'PollingObserver' - {error}
err_type_not_found: <!-- error... no files found for types '{exts}' -->
err_dir_empty: <!-- directory '{query}' is empty or not found -->
help_text:
[ general ]

^[G] / [F1]         : help
^[F]                : search
^[S]                : resolve
^[Q]                : abort

[ search ]

[Enter]             : next match
^[R]                : previous match
[Esc]               : close search
^[A/C/X/V]          : select / copy / cut / paste

[ issues ]

[Enter] / ^[N]      : next issue
^[R] / ^[P]         : previous issue
[Esc]               : close issues
^[G] / [F1]         : help from issues/search

[ autocomplete mentions ]

<@file:path>        : file
<@file:path:range>  : sliced file

            first n : first n lines
            last n  : last n lines
            n-m     : from n to m lines
            #n      : line n

<@dir:path>         : directory
<@tree:path>        : tree view
<@tree:path:level>  : depth-scoped tree
<@ext:list>         : files by extension
<@symbol:path:name> : file symbol
<@git:diff>         : working tree diff
<@git:diff:path>    : target work tree diff
<@git:status>       : work tree status
[@project]          : project structure

[ editing ]

^[A]                : select all
[Shift]             : select
^[Z/Y]              : undo / redo
^[C/X/V]            : copy / cut / paste
[Tab]               : indent / autocomplete
[Shift] + [Tab]     : unindent
[Alt]   + [^/v]     : shift cursor
^[/]                : comment out
^[W/Del]            : delete previous / next
[Enter]             : newline / accept

[ navigation ]

[^/v/</>]           : move
^[^/v/</>]          : next / previous
[Home/End]          : start / end
^[Home/End]         : file start / end
^[PgUp/PgDn]        : up / down (15x)

press [Enter], [F1] or ^[G] to dismiss
git_not_found: git executable not found in system path
err_prompt_toolkit_missing: 'prompt_toolkit' library is missing. install it using: 'uv pip install prompt_toolkit'
err_pygments_missing: 'pygments' library is missing. syntax highlighting will be disabled. install it using: 'uv pip install pygments'
err_rapidfuzz_missing: 'rapidfuzz' library is missing. install it using: 'uv pip install rapidfuzz'
